title: Nami Looks for Sky Island Clues
description: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Blackbeard, Nami, Bellamy, Sarquiss. After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Zena Haha Haha Haha Haha Haha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: The Cherry Pies here are the best!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What're you lookin' annoyed for, sister?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Those two won that fight just now.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: OH!? So you want to surpass us...?

dialogue.speaker: Sarquiss
dialogue.text: is when you're at the pirates' top.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Your comeback was sure somethin' too!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy crewman
dialogue.text: You've got some balls for a girl!

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: The "new age" those guys talk about,

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: The age when Pirates dream is ending...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's with all the noise outside?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: A man's... A man's dr... PFFT!

summary: After the humiliation in Mock Town, Blackbeard declares that pirate dreams will never die, sharply opposing Bellamy’s New Age cynicism.
